Success criteria: 1) Plan compliance: run python3 scripts/verify_plan_evidence.py .omo/plans/nfi-engine.md .omo/evidence and capture PLAN_EVIDENCE_OK referenced=118 missing=0 in .omo/evidence/final-plan-compliance.txt; manual channel is tmux transcript that runs the command and shows PASS. 2) Quality gate: confirm existing final-quality-gate.txt has ruff format/check, basedpyright, and pytest 227 passed; manual channel is tmux transcript that tails the artifact and shows PASS. 3) Real surface QA: confirm existing final-manual-qa.txt, curl final-api-ping/final-csrf-reject, browser screenshots, support zip, and docker cleanup evidence prove API/UI/Docker surfaces; manual channel is HTTP curl and file-artifact transcript. 4) Scope fidelity: confirm final-scope-fidelity.txt final verdict PASS plus no live port/container residue; manual channel is tmux transcript running residue checks. Completion may edit only .omo plan/ledger/boulder/ulw-loop state unless verification reveals a blocker.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-f1 'cd /home/user/nfi_engine && python3 scripts/verify_plan_evidence.py .omo/plans/nfi-engine.md .omo/evidence'; tmux capture-pane -pt ulw-qa-f1 -S -200; PASS iff output contains PLAN_EVIDENCE_OK referenced=118 missing=0
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/f1-plan-compliance.txt plus .omo/evidence/final-plan-compliance.txt

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-f2 'cd /home/user/nfi_engine && tail -n 30 .omo/evidence/final-quality-gate.txt'; tmux capture-pane -pt ulw-qa-f2 -S -200; PASS iff output contains All checks passed, 0 errors, and 227 passed
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/f2-quality-gate.txt plus .omo/evidence/final-quality-gate.txt
